queries.name: Guidevisningar per kategori
queries.description: Ta fram lista över guider i en specifik kategori med antal visningar
queries.mysql:
SELECT 
    s.id1 AS GuideID, 
    g.title AS Titel, 
    COUNT(*) AS Visningar,
    u.UserName AS Ägare,
    u.Email AS Email
FROM smartasslog s
JOIN guide g ON s.id1 = g.guideid
JOIN topicguidelink tgl ON g.guideid = tgl.guideid
JOIN authorguidelink agl ON g.guideid = agl.guideid
JOIN smartassuser u ON agl.UserID = u.UserID
WHERE s.logtype = 1 
    AND s.logdate BETWEEN '{{startDate}}' AND {{endDate}}
    AND tgl.TopicID = {{topicId}}
GROUP BY s.id1, g.title, u.UserName, u.Email
ORDER BY Visningar DESC;
queries.mssql:
SELECT 
    s.id1 AS GuideID, 
    g.title AS Titel, 
    COUNT(*) AS Visningar,
    u.UserName AS [Ägare],
    u.Email AS Email
FROM smartasslog s
JOIN guide g ON s.id1 = g.guideid
JOIN topicguidelink tgl ON g.guideid = tgl.guideid
JOIN authorguidelink agl ON g.guideid = agl.guideid
JOIN smartassuser u ON agl.UserID = u.UserID
WHERE s.logtype = 1 
    AND s.logdate BETWEEN '{{startDate}}' AND {{endDate}}
    AND tgl.TopicID = {{topicId}}
GROUP BY s.id1, g.title, u.UserName, u.Email
ORDER BY Visningar DESC;

queries.name: Sök i textguiders innehåll
queries.description: Hitta textguider som innehåller ett specifikt ord i innehållet
queries.mysql:
SELECT g.guideid, g.title 
FROM guide AS g 
JOIN sectionentitylink AS sel ON sel.EntityID = g.guideid
JOIN cellsectionlink AS csl ON csl.SectionID = sel.SectionID
JOIN cells AS c ON c.CellID = csl.CellID
WHERE g.guidetype = 7 
    AND c.Widget LIKE '%{{searchPhrase}}%' 
    AND g.removed = 'N';
queries.mssql:
SELECT g.guideid, g.title 
FROM guide AS g 
JOIN sectionentitylink AS sel ON sel.EntityID = g.guideid
JOIN cellsectionlink AS csl ON csl.SectionID = sel.SectionID
JOIN cells AS c ON c.CellID = csl.CellID
WHERE g.guidetype = 7 
    AND c.Widget LIKE '%{{searchPhrase}}%' 
    AND g.removed = 'N';

queries.name: Skapade guider per användare
queries.description: Antal skapade guider grupperat per användare
queries.mysql:
SELECT smartassuser.userid, smartassuser.username, COUNT(guide.ownerid) AS AntalGuider
FROM smartassuser
JOIN guide ON smartassuser.userid = guide.ownerid
GROUP BY guide.ownerid
ORDER BY COUNT(guide.ownerid) DESC;
queries.mssql:
SELECT smartassuser.userid, smartassuser.username, COUNT(guide.ownerid) AS AntalGuider
FROM smartassuser
JOIN guide ON smartassuser.userid = guide.ownerid
GROUP BY smartassuser.userid, smartassuser.username, guide.ownerid
ORDER BY COUNT(guide.ownerid) DESC;

queries.name: Guider per guidetyp
queries.description: Antal guider per guidetyp sorterat fallande
queries.mysql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS Antal,
  CASE guidetype
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Snabbguide'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Steg-för-steg-guide'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'LMS'
    WHEN 7 THEN 'Textguide'
    WHEN 9 THEN 'Kunskapstest'
    WHEN 11 THEN 'Översikt'
    WHEN 12 THEN 'Snabbinspelning'
    WHEN 13 THEN 'Push training'
    WHEN 14 THEN 'Kurs'
    WHEN 15 THEN 'URL'
    WHEN 16 THEN 'Ranking'
    WHEN 17 THEN 'Arbetsflöde'
    WHEN 100 THEN 'Process'
    ELSE 'Okänd'
  END AS Guidetyp
FROM guide
WHERE removed = 'N'
GROUP BY guidetype
ORDER BY Antal DESC;
queries.mssql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS Antal,
  CASE guidetype
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Snabbguide'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Steg-för-steg-guide'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'LMS'
    WHEN 7 THEN 'Textguide'
    WHEN 9 THEN 'Kunskapstest'
    WHEN 11 THEN 'Översikt'
    WHEN 12 THEN 'Snabbinspelning'
    WHEN 13 THEN 'Push training'
    WHEN 14 THEN 'Kurs'
    WHEN 15 THEN 'URL'
    WHEN 16 THEN 'Ranking'
    WHEN 17 THEN 'Arbetsflöde'
    WHEN 100 THEN 'Process'
    ELSE 'Okänd'
  END AS Guidetyp
FROM guide
WHERE removed = 'N'
GROUP BY guidetype
ORDER BY Antal DESC;

queries.name: Vem raderade guiden?
queries.description: Ta fram vem som raderat en guide (om den hunnit återställas)
queries.mysql:
SELECT id1 AS GuideID, id2 AS UserID, logdate 
FROM smartasslog 
WHERE logtype = 31 
ORDER BY logdate DESC;
queries.mssql:
SELECT id1 AS GuideID, id2 AS UserID, logdate 
FROM smartasslog 
WHERE logtype = 31 
ORDER BY logdate DESC;

queries.name: Guider med kategorier
queries.description: Lista alla guider med deras kategorikopplingar
queries.mysql:
SELECT guide.guideid, guide.title, topic.Name AS Kategori
FROM guide 
JOIN topicguidelink ON guide.guideid = topicguidelink.guideid 
JOIN topic ON topic.topicid = topicguidelink.topicid 
ORDER BY guide.guideid;
queries.mssql:
SELECT guide.guideid, guide.title, topic.Name AS Kategori
FROM guide 
JOIN topicguidelink ON guide.guideid = topicguidelink.guideid 
JOIN topic ON topic.topicid = topicguidelink.topicid 
ORDER BY guide.guideid;

queries.name: Guider utan kategorier
queries.description: Hitta guider som saknar kategorikoppling
queries.mysql:
SELECT guide.guideid, guide.title, smartassuser.email AS Ägare
FROM guide
JOIN smartassuser ON smartassuser.userid = guide.ownerid
LEFT JOIN topicguidelink ON guide.guideid = topicguidelink.guideid
LEFT JOIN topic ON topicguidelink.topicid = topic.topicid
WHERE topic.topicid IS NULL
ORDER BY guide.guideid;
queries.mssql:
SELECT guide.guideid, guide.title, smartassuser.email AS [Ägare]
FROM guide
JOIN smartassuser ON smartassuser.userid = guide.ownerid
LEFT JOIN topicguidelink ON guide.guideid = topicguidelink.guideid
LEFT JOIN topic ON topicguidelink.topicid = topic.topicid
WHERE topic.topicid IS NULL
ORDER BY guide.guideid;

queries.name: Dubletter av guider
queries.description: Hitta guider med samma titel
queries.mysql:
SELECT title, COUNT(title) AS Antal
FROM guide 
GROUP BY title 
HAVING COUNT(title) > 1;
queries.mssql:
SELECT title, COUNT(title) AS Antal
FROM guide 
GROUP BY title 
HAVING COUNT(title) > 1;

queries.name: Utgångna guider
queries.description: Guider vars giltighetsdatum har passerat
queries.mysql:
SELECT title, guideID, Validto
FROM guide
WHERE validto < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY Validto DESC;
queries.mssql:
SELECT title, guideID, Validto
FROM guide
WHERE validto < GETDATE()
ORDER BY Validto DESC;

queries.name: Nollställ visningar
queries.description: Sätt visningar till 0 på en specifik guide
queries.mysql: UPDATE guide SET NoOfAccesses = 0 WHERE GuideID = {{guideId}};
queries.mssql: UPDATE guide SET NoOfAccesses = 0 WHERE GuideID = {{guideId}};

queries.name: Guidevisningar i tidsintervall
queries.description: Lista guider sorterade efter visningar inom ett datumintervall
queries.mysql:
SELECT g.Title, log.ID1 AS GuideID, COUNT(log.ID1) AS Antal 
FROM smartasslog AS log 
JOIN guide AS g ON g.guideid = log.ID1 
WHERE log.LogDate > '{{startDate}}' AND log.LogDate < '{{endDate}}' AND log.logtype = 1 
GROUP BY log.ID1, g.Title
ORDER BY COUNT(log.ID1) DESC;
queries.mssql:
SELECT g.Title, log.ID1 AS GuideID, COUNT(log.ID1) AS Antal 
FROM smartasslog AS log 
JOIN guide AS g ON g.guideid = log.ID1 
WHERE log.LogDate > '{{startDate}}' AND log.LogDate < '{{endDate}}' AND log.logtype = 1 
GROUP BY log.ID1, g.Title
ORDER BY COUNT(log.ID1) DESC;

queries.name: Guidevisningar med publiceringsdatum
queries.description: Lista guider med visningar och publiceringsdatum
queries.mysql:
SELECT g.PublicationDate AS Publicerad, g.Title, log.ID1 AS GuideID, COUNT(log.ID1) AS Antal 
FROM smartasslog AS log 
JOIN guide AS g ON g.guideid = log.ID1 
WHERE log.LogDate > '{{startDate}}' AND log.LogDate < '{{endDate}}' AND log.logtype = 1 
GROUP BY log.ID1, g.Title, g.PublicationDate
ORDER BY COUNT(log.ID1) DESC;
queries.mssql:
SELECT g.PublicationDate AS Publicerad, g.Title, log.ID1 AS GuideID, COUNT(log.ID1) AS Antal 
FROM smartasslog AS log 
JOIN guide AS g ON g.guideid = log.ID1 
WHERE log.LogDate > '{{startDate}}' AND log.LogDate < '{{endDate}}' AND log.logtype = 1 
GROUP BY log.ID1, g.Title, g.PublicationDate
ORDER BY COUNT(log.ID1) DESC;

queries.name: Topplista visningar specifikt datum
queries.description: Guider med flest visningar på ett specifikt datum
queries.mysql:
SELECT s.id1 AS GuideID, g.title AS Titel, COUNT(*) AS Visningar
FROM smartasslog s
JOIN guide g ON s.id1 = g.guideid
WHERE s.logtype = 1 AND s.logdate LIKE '{{date}}%'
GROUP BY s.id1, g.title
ORDER BY Visningar DESC;
queries.mssql:
SELECT s.id1 AS GuideID, g.title AS Titel, COUNT(*) AS Visningar
FROM smartasslog s
JOIN guide g ON s.id1 = g.guideid
WHERE s.logtype = 1 AND CONVERT(DATE, s.logdate) = '{{date}}'
GROUP BY s.id1, g.title
ORDER BY Visningar DESC;

queries.name: Klassiska textguider
queries.description: Lista alla klassiska textguider med GuideID, titel och användarnamn
queries.mysql:
SELECT guide.guideid, guide.title, smartassuser.username
FROM guide
INNER JOIN smartassuser ON guide.ownerid = smartassuser.UserID 
WHERE guidetype = 7 AND playmode = 0;
queries.mssql:
SELECT guide.guideid, guide.title, smartassuser.username
FROM guide
INNER JOIN smartassuser ON guide.ownerid = smartassuser.UserID 
WHERE guidetype = 7 AND playmode = 0;

queries.name: Guider som länkar till specifik guide
queries.description: Hitta guider som innehåller en länk till en specifik guide
queries.mysql:
SELECT g.guideid, g.title 
FROM cells AS c
JOIN cellsectionlink AS csl ON csl.CellID = c.CellID
JOIN sections AS s ON s.SectionID = csl.EntityID
JOIN sectionentitylink AS sel ON sel.sectionid = s.SectionID
JOIN guide AS g ON sel.entityid = g.guideid
WHERE c.widget LIKE '%{{linkedGuideId}}.guide%';
queries.mssql:
SELECT g.guideid, g.title 
FROM cells AS c
JOIN cellsectionlink AS csl ON csl.CellID = c.CellID
JOIN sections AS s ON s.SectionID = csl.EntityID
JOIN sectionentitylink AS sel ON sel.sectionid = s.SectionID
JOIN guide AS g ON sel.entityid = g.guideid
WHERE c.widget LIKE '%{{linkedGuideId}}.guide%';

queries.name: Alla guider - detaljerad vy
queries.description: Komplett lista över alla guider med kategorier, typ och ägarinfo
queries.mysql:
SELECT 
   g.guideid,
   g.title,
   g.lastmodifiedtimestamp AS SenastÄndrad,
   g.publicationdate AS Publicerad,
   g.lastaccessed AS SenastVisad,
   g.searchable AS Sökbar,
   g.NoOfAccesses AS Visningar,
   CASE g.guidetype
     WHEN 1 THEN 'Snabbguide'
     WHEN 2 THEN 'Steg-för-steg-guide'
     WHEN 6 THEN 'LMS'
     WHEN 7 THEN 'Textguide'
     WHEN 9 THEN 'Kunskapstest'
     WHEN 11 THEN 'Översikt'
     WHEN 12 THEN 'Snabbinspelning'
     WHEN 13 THEN 'Push training'
     WHEN 14 THEN 'Kurs'
     WHEN 15 THEN 'URL'
     WHEN 16 THEN 'Ranking'
     WHEN 17 THEN 'Arbetsflöde'
     WHEN 100 THEN 'Process'
     ELSE 'Okänd'
   END AS Guidetyp,
   u.email AS ÄgareEmail,
   u.username AS Ägare,
   t.name AS Kategori
FROM guide g
LEFT JOIN smartassuser u ON g.ownerid = u.userid
LEFT JOIN topicguidelink tg ON g.guideid = tg.guideid  
LEFT JOIN topic t ON tg.topicid = t.topicid  
WHERE g.removed = 'N'
ORDER BY g.guidetype, g.guideid;
queries.mssql:
SELECT 
   g.guideid,
   g.title,
   g.lastmodifiedtimestamp AS SenastÄndrad,
   g.publicationdate AS Publicerad,
   g.lastaccessed AS SenastVisad,
   g.searchable AS Sökbar,
   g.NoOfAccesses AS Visningar,
   CASE g.guidetype
     WHEN 1 THEN 'Snabbguide'
     WHEN 2 THEN 'Steg-för-steg-guide'
     WHEN 6 THEN 'LMS'
     WHEN 7 THEN 'Textguide'
     WHEN 9 THEN 'Kunskapstest'
     WHEN 11 THEN 'Översikt'
     WHEN 12 THEN 'Snabbinspelning'
     WHEN 13 THEN 'Push training'
     WHEN 14 THEN 'Kurs'
     WHEN 15 THEN 'URL'
     WHEN 16 THEN 'Ranking'
     WHEN 17 THEN 'Arbetsflöde'
     WHEN 100 THEN 'Process'
     ELSE 'Okänd'
   END AS Guidetyp,
   u.email AS [ÄgareEmail],
   u.username AS [Ägare],
   t.name AS Kategori
FROM guide g
LEFT JOIN smartassuser u ON g.ownerid = u.userid
LEFT JOIN topicguidelink tg ON g.guideid = tg.guideid  
LEFT JOIN topic t ON tg.topicid = t.topicid  
WHERE g.removed = 'N'
ORDER BY g.guidetype, g.guideid;

queries.name: Sök i titel och summering
queries.description: Hitta guider baserat på innehåll i titel och summering
queries.mysql:
SELECT title, guideid 
FROM guide AS g 
WHERE g.title LIKE '%{{searchWord}}%' 
   OR g.description LIKE '%{{searchWord}}%' 
   OR g.summary LIKE '%{{searchWord}}%';
queries.mssql:
SELECT title, guideid 
FROM guide AS g 
WHERE g.title LIKE '%{{searchWord}}%' 
   OR g.description LIKE '%{{searchWord}}%' 
   OR g.summary LIKE '%{{searchWord}}%';

queries.name: Sök i cellinnehåll
queries.description: Hitta guider där en cell innehåller ett visst ord
queries.mysql:
SELECT title, guideid FROM guide WHERE guideid IN 
   (SELECT EntityID FROM sectionentitylink WHERE SectionID IN
     (SELECT sectionID FROM sections WHERE sectionid IN 
       (SELECT EntityID FROM cellsectionlink WHERE CellID IN 
        (SELECT CellID FROM cells WHERE widget LIKE '%{{searchWord}}%'))));
queries.mssql:
SELECT title, guideid FROM guide WHERE guideid IN 
   (SELECT EntityID FROM sectionentitylink WHERE SectionID IN
     (SELECT sectionID FROM sections WHERE sectionid IN 
       (SELECT EntityID FROM cellsectionlink WHERE CellID IN 
        (SELECT CellID FROM cells WHERE widget LIKE '%{{searchWord}}%'))));

queries.name: Guider i arbetsflöde
queries.description: Lista alla guider kopplade till ett specifikt arbetsflöde
queries.mysql:
SELECT do.GuideID
FROM Diagram d
JOIN DiagramObject do ON do.DiagramID = d.DiagramID
JOIN Guide g ON g.GuideID = do.GuideID
WHERE d.ProsydoEntityID = {{workflowGuideId}}
  AND d.DiagramTypeID = 3
  AND do.GuideID IS NOT NULL
  {{#guideType}}AND g.GuideType = {{guideType}}{{/guideType}};
queries.mssql:
SELECT do.GuideID
FROM Diagram d
JOIN DiagramObject do ON do.DiagramID = d.DiagramID
JOIN Guide g ON g.GuideID = do.GuideID
WHERE d.ProsydoEntityID = {{workflowGuideId}}
  AND d.DiagramTypeID = 3
  AND do.GuideID IS NOT NULL
  {{#guideType}}AND g.GuideType = {{guideType}}{{/guideType}};

queries.name: Guider i process
queries.description: Lista alla guider kopplade till en process (via processnamn)
queries.mysql:
SELECT DISTINCT do.GuideID
FROM DiagramObject do
JOIN Diagram d ON d.DiagramID = do.DiagramID
JOIN Process p ON p.DiagramID = d.DiagramID
WHERE p.ProcessName = '{{processName}}'
  AND p.ActiveVersion = 1
  AND d.DiagramTypeID = 2
  AND do.GuideID IS NOT NULL;
queries.mssql:
SELECT DISTINCT do.GuideID
FROM DiagramObject do
JOIN Diagram d ON d.DiagramID = do.DiagramID
JOIN Process p ON p.DiagramID = d.DiagramID
WHERE p.ProcessName = '{{processName}}'
  AND p.ActiveVersion = 1
  AND d.DiagramTypeID = 2
  AND do.GuideID IS NOT NULL;

queries.name: Guider med globala mallar
queries.description: Lista guider som använder globala sektions- och cellmallar
queries.mysql:
SELECT 
    g.GuideID,
    g.Title AS GuideName,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT gt.Name ORDER BY gt.Name SEPARATOR ', ') AS TemplateNames
FROM guide g
INNER JOIN sectionentitylink sel ON g.GuideID = sel.EntityID AND sel.EntityType = 0
INNER JOIN cellsectionlink csl ON sel.SectionID = csl.EntityID
INNER JOIN cells c ON csl.CellID = c.CellID
INNER JOIN guidetemplate gt ON c.TemplateID = gt.GuideTemplateID
WHERE gt.GlobalState = 'Y'
GROUP BY g.GuideID, g.Title
ORDER BY g.Title;
queries.mssql:
SELECT 
    g.GuideID,
    g.Title AS GuideName,
    STRING_AGG(gt.Name, ', ') AS TemplateNames
FROM guide g
INNER JOIN sectionentitylink sel ON g.GuideID = sel.EntityID AND sel.EntityType = 0
INNER JOIN cellsectionlink csl ON sel.SectionID = csl.EntityID
INNER JOIN cells c ON csl.CellID = c.CellID
INNER JOIN guidetemplate gt ON c.TemplateID = gt.GuideTemplateID
WHERE gt.GlobalState = 'Y'
GROUP BY g.GuideID, g.Title
ORDER BY g.Title;

queries.name: Användares publicerade guider
queries.description: Visa vilka guider en specifik användare senast har publicerat/uppdaterat
queries.mysql:
SELECT
  g.guideid,
  g.title AS guide_title,
  CASE l.logtype
    WHEN 7  THEN 'Publicerad'
    WHEN 20 THEN 'Uppdaterad'
  END AS event_type,
  l.logdate AS log_timestamp
FROM guide AS g
JOIN (
  SELECT ID1 AS guideid, MAX(logdate) AS max_logdate
  FROM smartasslog
  WHERE logtype IN (7, 20) AND ID2 = {{userId}}
  GROUP BY ID1
) latest ON latest.guideid = g.guideid
JOIN smartasslog AS l ON l.ID1 = latest.guideid AND l.logdate = latest.max_logdate
WHERE l.logtype IN (7, 20) AND l.ID2 = {{userId}}
ORDER BY l.logdate DESC, g.guideid;
queries.mssql:
SELECT
  g.guideid,
  g.title AS guide_title,
  CASE l.logtype
    WHEN 7  THEN 'Publicerad'
    WHEN 20 THEN 'Uppdaterad'
  END AS event_type,
  l.logdate AS log_timestamp
FROM guide AS g
JOIN (
  SELECT ID1 AS guideid, MAX(logdate) AS max_logdate
  FROM smartasslog
  WHERE logtype IN (7, 20) AND ID2 = {{userId}}
  GROUP BY ID1
) latest ON latest.guideid = g.guideid
JOIN smartasslog AS l ON l.ID1 = latest.guideid AND l.logdate = latest.max_logdate
WHERE l.logtype IN (7, 20) AND l.ID2 = {{userId}}
ORDER BY l.logdate DESC, g.guideid;

queries.name: Aktiva producenter (6 mån)
queries.description: Antal producenter som varit aktiva senaste 6 månaderna
queries.mysql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID2) AS AktivaProdcenter
FROM smartasslog 
WHERE LogDate >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) 
  AND (LogType = 19 OR LogType = 20);
queries.mssql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID2) AS AktivaProdcenter
FROM smartasslog 
WHERE LogDate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE()) 
  AND (LogType = 19 OR LogType = 20);

queries.name: Alla användare med email
queries.description: Lista alla användare med användarnamn och email
queries.mysql:
SELECT userid, username, email 
FROM smartassuser;
queries.mssql:
SELECT userid, username, email 
FROM smartassuser;

queries.name: Alla användare - komplett
queries.description: All information om alla användare
queries.mysql: SELECT * FROM smartassuser;
queries.mssql: SELECT * FROM smartassuser;

queries.name: Återställ lösenord
queries.description: Återställ lösenord till 'smartass' för en specifik användare

queries.name: Antal medlemmar per grupp
queries.description: Lista antal medlemmar i varje grupp

queries.name: Gruppmedlemmar
queries.description: Lista alla medlemmar i alla grupper
queries.mysql:
SELECT g.GroupId, g.name,
(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(su.UserName) FROM lmsusergroup AS ug
JOIN smartassuser AS su ON su.UserID = ug.UserId
WHERE ug.GroupId = g.GroupId) AS Members 
FROM lmsgroup AS g
WHERE g.GroupType IN ({{groupTypes}})
ORDER BY g.Name;
queries.mssql:
SELECT g.GroupId, g.name,
(SELECT STRING_AGG(su.UserName, ', ') FROM lmsusergroup AS ug
JOIN smartassuser AS su ON su.UserID = ug.UserId
WHERE ug.GroupId = g.GroupId) AS Members 
FROM lmsgroup AS g
WHERE g.GroupType IN ({{groupTypes}})
ORDER BY g.Name;

queries.name: Grupper kopplade till kurser
queries.description: Lista alla grupper som är kopplade till en kurs
queries.mysql:
SELECT lmscourse.title AS Kurs, lmsgroup.name AS Grupp 
FROM lmsgroupcourse
JOIN lmscourse ON lmsgroupcourse.courseid = lmscourse.courseid
JOIN lmsgroup ON lmsgroupcourse.groupid = lmsgroup.groupid
ORDER BY lmscourse.title;
queries.mssql:
SELECT lmscourse.title AS Kurs, lmsgroup.name AS Grupp 
FROM lmsgroupcourse
JOIN lmscourse ON lmsgroupcourse.courseid = lmscourse.courseid
JOIN lmsgroup ON lmsgroupcourse.groupid = lmsgroup.groupid
ORDER BY lmscourse.title;

queries.name: Rapport - skapade användare
queries.description: Statistik över hur användare är skapade
queries.mysql:
SELECT
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType = 1) AS Config,
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType = 2) AS SSO,
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType = 3) AS PushTraining,
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType = 4) AS SelfRegistred,
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType = 5) AS Imported,
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType IS NULL) AS Unknown;
queries.mssql:
SELECT
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType = 1) AS Config,
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType = 2) AS SSO,
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType = 3) AS PushTraining,
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType = 4) AS SelfRegistred,
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType = 5) AS Imported,
(SELECT COUNT(UserID) FROM smartassuser WHERE CreateType IS NULL) AS [Unknown];

queries.name: Användare - skapningsmetod
queries.description: Lista användare med hur de skapades
queries.mysql:
SELECT
    u.username,
    u.email,
    u.validto,
    CASE u.CreateType
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Manuellt'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'SSO'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'PushTraining'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'SelfRegistered'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Importerad'
        WHEN 0 THEN 'Okänd'
        ELSE 'Okänd'
    END AS CreateTypeLabel
FROM smartassuser AS u
ORDER BY u.username;
queries.mssql:
SELECT
    u.username,
    u.email,
    u.validto,
    CASE u.CreateType
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Manuellt'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'SSO'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'PushTraining'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'SelfRegistered'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Importerad'
        WHEN 0 THEN 'Okänd'
        ELSE 'Okänd'
    END AS CreateTypeLabel
FROM smartassuser AS u
ORDER BY u.username;

queries.name: Producenter per datumintervall
queries.description: Vilka som har publicerat guider mellan specifika datum
queries.mysql:
SELECT firstname, lastname, email 
FROM smartassuser
JOIN authorguidelink ON authorguidelink.UserID = smartassuser.userID
JOIN guide ON authorguidelink.GuideID = guide.GuideID
WHERE guide.PublicationDate > '{{startDate}}' AND guide.PublicationDate < '{{endDate}}'
GROUP BY smartassuser.UserID, firstname, lastname, email;
queries.mssql:
SELECT firstname, lastname, email 
FROM smartassuser
JOIN authorguidelink ON authorguidelink.UserID = smartassuser.userID
JOIN guide ON authorguidelink.GuideID = guide.GuideID
WHERE guide.PublicationDate > '{{startDate}}' AND guide.PublicationDate < '{{endDate}}'
GROUP BY smartassuser.UserID, firstname, lastname, email;

queries.name: Unika portalbesökare
queries.description: Antal unika användare som besökt en specifik portal

queries.name: Alla grupper med medlemsantal
queries.description: Lista alla grupper med antal medlemmar och senaste redigering
queries.mysql:
SELECT
    lg.groupid,
    lg.name,
    COUNT(lug.userID) AS user_count,
    lg.grouptype,
    CASE
        WHEN lg.grouptype = 0 THEN 'System Group'
        WHEN lg.grouptype = 1 THEN 'Importerad'
        WHEN lg.grouptype = 2 THEN 'Unknown'
        WHEN lg.grouptype = 3 THEN 'Automatisk Systemgrupp'
        WHEN lg.grouptype = 4 THEN 'Automatisk Systemgrupp'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS grouptype_description,
    lg.lastmodified
FROM lmsgroup lg
LEFT JOIN lmsusergroup lug ON lg.groupid = lug.groupid
WHERE lg.name NOT LIKE '%push training%'
  AND lg.name NOT LIKE '%manager%'
  AND lg.name NOT LIKE '%temp -%'
GROUP BY lg.groupid, lg.name, lg.grouptype, lg.lastmodified;
queries.mssql:
SELECT
    lg.groupid,
    lg.name,
    COUNT(lug.userID) AS user_count,
    lg.grouptype,
    CASE
        WHEN lg.grouptype = 0 THEN 'System Group'
        WHEN lg.grouptype = 1 THEN 'Importerad'
        WHEN lg.grouptype = 2 THEN 'Unknown'
        WHEN lg.grouptype = 3 THEN 'Automatisk Systemgrupp'
        WHEN lg.grouptype = 4 THEN 'Automatisk Systemgrupp'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS grouptype_description,
    lg.lastmodified
FROM lmsgroup lg
LEFT JOIN lmsusergroup lug ON lg.groupid = lug.groupid
WHERE lg.name NOT LIKE '%push training%'
  AND lg.name NOT LIKE '%manager%'
  AND lg.name NOT LIKE '%temp -%'
GROUP BY lg.groupid, lg.name, lg.grouptype, lg.lastmodified;

queries.name: GuideEditor-användare
queries.description: Alla användare med GuideEditor-rättigheter
queries.mysql:
SELECT smartassuserrights.area, smartassuser.email, smartassuser.username 
FROM smartassuserrights 
LEFT JOIN smartassuser ON smartassuserrights.userid = smartassuser.userid 
WHERE smartassuserrights.area = 6 AND smartassuserrights.level = 1;
queries.mssql:
SELECT smartassuserrights.area, smartassuser.email, smartassuser.username 
FROM smartassuserrights

WHERE smartassuserrights.area = 6 AND smartassuserrights.level = 1;

queries.name: Alla användare med rättigheter
queries.description: Detaljerad lista över alla användare som har rättigheter
queries.mysql:
SELECT DISTINCT 
    su.userid AS AnvändarID,
    su.email AS Mailadress, 
    su.username AS Användarnamn,
    su.firstname AS Förnamn,
    su.lastname AS Efternamn,
    su.Interests AS Chef,
    su.Occupation AS Sysselsättning,
    su.department AS Förvaltning,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (3, 4, 5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
             AND SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (6, 7, 8, 12, 13, 15, 16) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN 'Administratör och Producent'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (3, 4, 5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN 'Administratör'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (6, 7, 8, 12, 13, 15, 16) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN 'Producent'
        ELSE 'None'
    END AS Rättigheter
FROM smartassuserrights sar
INNER JOIN smartassuser su ON sar.userid = su.userid
WHERE sar.level = 1
GROUP BY su.userid, su.email, su.username, su.firstname, su.lastname, su.Interests, su.Occupation, su.department
HAVING Rättigheter != 'None';
queries.mssql:
SELECT DISTINCT 
    su.userid AS AnvändarID,
    su.email AS Mailadress, 
    su.username AS Användarnamn,
    su.firstname AS Förnamn,
    su.lastname AS Efternamn,
    su.Interests AS Chef,
    su.Occupation AS Sysselsättning,
    su.department AS Förvaltning,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (3, 4, 5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
             AND SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (6, 7, 8, 12, 13, 15, 16) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN 'Administratör och Producent'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (3, 4, 5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN 'Administratör'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (6, 7, 8, 12, 13, 15, 16) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN 'Producent'
        ELSE 'None'
    END AS Rättigheter
FROM smartassuserrights sar
INNER JOIN smartassuser su ON sar.userid = su.userid
WHERE sar.level = 1
GROUP BY su.userid, su.email, su.username, su.firstname, su.lastname, su.Interests, su.Occupation, su.department
HAVING CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (3, 4, 5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (6, 7, 8, 12, 13, 15, 16) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Administratör och Producent' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (3, 4, 5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Administratör' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sar.area IN (6, 7, 8, 12, 13, 15, 16) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Producent' ELSE 'None' END != 'None';

queries.name: Antal producenter
queries.description: Räkna totalt antal producenter på servern
queries.mysql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT UserID) AS AntalProducenter
FROM smartassuserrights 
WHERE (Area = 7 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 8 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 6 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 12 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 13 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 16 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 19 AND Level = 1);
queries.mssql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT UserID) AS AntalProducenter
FROM smartassuserrights 
WHERE (Area = 7 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 8 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 6 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 12 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 13 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 16 AND Level = 1) 
   OR (Area = 19 AND Level = 1);

queries.name: Kursdata
queries.description: Hämta ut kursdata med guidekoppling
queries.mysql:
SELECT c.courseID, c.title, c.created, g.guideid, g.title AS GuideTitle
FROM lmscourse AS c 
LEFT JOIN guide AS g ON g.title = c.title AND g.guidetype = 14  
ORDER BY c.title;
queries.mssql:
SELECT c.courseID, c.title, c.created, g.guideid, g.title AS GuideTitle
FROM lmscourse AS c 
LEFT JOIN guide AS g ON g.title = c.title AND g.guidetype = 14  
ORDER BY c.title;

queries.mssql: UPDATE guide SET NoOfAccesses = 0 WHERE GuideType IS NOT NULL;

queries.name: Kurser utan guidekoppling
queries.description: Hitta kurser som saknar koppling till guide

SELECT c.CourseID, c.Title, c.guideID 
FROM lmscourse AS c 
LEFT JOIN guide AS g ON c.GuideID = g.GuideID 
WHERE c.GuideID IS NULL;
queries.mssql:
SELECT c.CourseID, c.Title, c.guideID 
FROM lmscourse AS c

WHERE c.GuideID IS NULL;

queries.name: Kurser i papperskorgen
queries.description: Hitta kurser där guiden ligger i papperskorgen
queries.mysql:
SELECT c.CourseID, c.Title, c.guideID, g.title, g.removed 
FROM lmscourse AS c 
JOIN guide AS g ON c.GuideID = g.GuideID 
WHERE g.removed <> 'N' OR g.removed IS NULL;
queries.mssql:

JOIN guide AS g ON c.GuideID = g.GuideID

queries.name: Kunskapstest-resultat
queries.description: Hämta kunskapstestdata för specifik användare och kurs
queries.mysql:
SELECT cm.userID, su.username, cs.raw, co.lesson_status, co.Started, co.LastTime, se.* 
FROM lmscmi AS cm
JOIN lmscorescore AS cs ON cm.cmiID = cs.cmiID
JOIN lmscore AS co ON co.cmiid = cm.cmiID
JOIN smartassuser AS su ON su.userID = cm.userID
JOIN lmssession AS se ON se.cmiID = cm.cmiID
WHERE cm.CourseID = {{courseId}} AND hRefID = {{hRefId}} AND cm.userID = {{userId}};
queries.mssql:
SELECT cm.userID, su.username, cs.raw, co.lesson_status, co.Started, co.LastTime, se.* 
FROM lmscmi AS cm
JOIN lmscorescore AS cs ON cm.cmiID = cs.cmiID
JOIN lmscore AS co ON co.cmiid = cm.cmiID
JOIN smartassuser AS su ON su.userID = cm.userID
JOIN lmssession AS se ON se.cmiID = cm.cmiID
WHERE cm.CourseID = {{courseId}} AND hRefID = {{hRefId}} AND cm.userID = {{userId}};

queries.name: Användarresultat för guide i kurs
queries.description: Lista en användares resultat på en guide i en kurs
queries.mysql:
SELECT ses.* FROM lmscmi AS cmi
JOIN lmshref AS href ON href.hRefId = cmi.hRefId
JOIN lmssession AS ses ON ses.cmiId = cmi.cmiId
WHERE cmi.UserId = {{userId}} AND cmi.CourseID = {{courseId}} AND href.GuideId = {{guideId}};
queries.mssql:
SELECT ses.* FROM lmscmi AS cmi
JOIN lmshref AS href ON href.hRefId = cmi.hRefId
JOIN lmssession AS ses ON ses.cmiId = cmi.cmiId
WHERE cmi.UserId = {{userId}} AND cmi.CourseID = {{courseId}} AND href.GuideId = {{guideId}};

queries.name: Gruppresultat för kurs
queries.description: Lista en grupps detaljerade resultat på en kurs

queries.name: Processer utan kategori
queries.description: Hitta processer som saknar kategori
queries.mysql:
SELECT
    p.ProcessID,
    p.ProcessName,
    COALESCE(u.Email, 'Ingen ägare') AS ProcessOwnerEmail,
    o.OrganizationName
FROM (
    SELECT MAX(ProcessID) AS MaxProcessID, ProcessName
    FROM Process
    WHERE Removed = 0 
    GROUP BY ProcessName
) latest_process
JOIN Process p ON latest_process.MaxProcessID = p.ProcessID
LEFT JOIN topicprocesslink tpl ON p.ProcessID = tpl.ProcessID
LEFT JOIN Positions pos ON p.ProcessOwnerPositionID = pos.PositionID
LEFT JOIN smartassuser u ON pos.PositionID = u.UserID
LEFT JOIN Organization o ON p.OrganizationID = o.OrganizationID
WHERE tpl.ProcessID IS NULL;
queries.mssql:
SELECT
    p.ProcessID,
    p.ProcessName,
    COALESCE(u.Email, 'Ingen ägare') AS ProcessOwnerEmail,
    o.OrganizationName
FROM (
    SELECT MAX(ProcessID) AS MaxProcessID, ProcessName
    FROM Process
    WHERE Removed = 0 
    GROUP BY ProcessName
) latest_process
JOIN Process p ON latest_process.MaxProcessID = p.ProcessID
LEFT JOIN topicprocesslink tpl ON p.ProcessID = tpl.ProcessID
LEFT JOIN Positions pos ON p.ProcessOwnerPositionID = pos.PositionID
LEFT JOIN smartassuser u ON pos.PositionID = u.UserID
LEFT JOIN Organization o ON p.OrganizationID = o.OrganizationID
WHERE tpl.ProcessID IS NULL;

queries.name: Lägg till kategori till processer
queries.description: Lägg till en kategori till alla processer som saknar kategori
queries.mysql:
INSERT INTO topicprocesslink (TopicID, ProcessID)
SELECT {{topicId}}, p.ProcessID
FROM Process p
LEFT JOIN topicprocesslink t ON p.ProcessID = t.ProcessID
WHERE t.ProcessID IS NULL;
queries.mssql:
INSERT INTO topicprocesslink (TopicID, ProcessID)
SELECT {{topicId}}, p.ProcessID
FROM Process p
LEFT JOIN topicprocesslink t ON p.ProcessID = t.ProcessID
WHERE t.ProcessID IS NULL;

queries.name: Alla sökningar
queries.description: Lista alla sökningar inom ett datumintervall

queries.name: Topplista portaler
queries.description: De mest besökta portalerna senaste året
queries.mysql:
SELECT sf.FilterName AS Portal, COUNT(*) AS Besök 
FROM smartasslog AS sl
JOIN searchfilter AS sf ON sf.SearchFilterID = sl.ID1
WHERE sl.LogType = 25 AND sl.LogDate > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
GROUP BY ID1, sf.FilterName
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 10;
queries.mssql:
SELECT TOP 10 sf.FilterName AS Portal, COUNT(*) AS Besök 
FROM smartasslog AS sl
JOIN searchfilter AS sf ON sf.SearchFilterID = sl.ID1
WHERE sl.LogType = 25 AND sl.LogDate > DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE())
GROUP BY ID1, sf.FilterName
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

queries.name: Rensa omatchade sökningar
queries.description: Ta bort alla omatchade sökningar
queries.mysql: DELETE FROM unmatchedsearch;
queries.mssql: DELETE FROM unmatchedsearch;

queries.name: Inline-starter
queries.description: Antal gånger Inline har startats

queries.name: Topplista kontexter
queries.description: Mest visade Inline-kontexter
queries.mysql:
SELECT c.ContextHelpID, c.Name, COUNT(c.ContextHelpID) AS Antal 
FROM smartasslog l 
INNER JOIN contexthelptarget t ON t.TargetID = l.ID2
INNER JOIN contexthelp c ON c.ContextHelpID = t.ContextHelpID 
WHERE l.LogType = 29 AND l.LogDate > '{{startDate}}'
GROUP BY c.ContextHelpID, c.Name 
ORDER BY Antal DESC;
queries.mssql:
SELECT c.ContextHelpID, c.Name, COUNT(c.ContextHelpID) AS Antal 
FROM smartasslog l 
INNER JOIN contexthelptarget t ON t.TargetID = l.ID2
INNER JOIN contexthelp c ON c.ContextHelpID = t.ContextHelpID 
WHERE l.LogType = 29 AND l.LogDate > '{{startDate}}'
GROUP BY c.ContextHelpID, c.Name 
ORDER BY Antal DESC;

queries.name: Topplista startade guider
queries.description: Mest startade guider via Inline
queries.mysql:
SELECT g.GuideID, g.Title, COUNT(g.GuideID) AS Antal 
FROM smartasslog l 
INNER JOIN guide g ON g.GuideID = l.ID1 
WHERE l.LogType = 30 AND l.LogDate > '{{startDate}}'
GROUP BY g.GuideID, g.Title 
ORDER BY Antal DESC;
queries.mssql:
SELECT g.GuideID, g.Title, COUNT(g.GuideID) AS Antal 
FROM smartasslog l 
INNER JOIN guide g ON g.GuideID = l.ID1 
WHERE l.LogType = 30 AND l.LogDate > '{{startDate}}'
GROUP BY g.GuideID, g.Title 
ORDER BY Antal DESC;

queries.name: Inline-API starter per dag
queries.description: Hur ofta har Inline-API startat per dag
queries.mysql:
SELECT CAST(LogDate AS DATE) AS Datum, COUNT(*) AS Antal
FROM smartasslog 
WHERE LogType = 28 
  AND LogDate > '{{startDate}}' 
  AND LogDate < '{{endDate}}' 
  AND Data1 = 'API' 
GROUP BY CAST(LogDate AS DATE) 
ORDER BY Datum;
queries.mssql:
SELECT CAST(LogDate AS DATE) AS Datum, COUNT(*) AS Antal
FROM smartasslog 
WHERE LogType = 28 
  AND LogDate > '{{startDate}}' 
  AND LogDate < '{{endDate}}' 
  AND Data1 = 'API' 
GROUP BY CAST(LogDate AS DATE) 
ORDER BY Datum;

queries.name: Ogiltiga e-postmottagare
queries.description: Hitta e-postutskick med ogiltiga mottagaradresser

queries.name: Antal inloggningar (6 mån)
queries.description: Hämta antal inloggningar senaste 6 månaderna
queries.mysql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS AntalInloggningar
FROM smartasslog 
WHERE logtype = 14 
  AND logdate >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL {{months}} MONTH) 
  AND logdate <= NOW();
queries.mssql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS AntalInloggningar
FROM smartasslog 
WHERE logtype = 14 
  AND logdate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -{{months}}, GETDATE()) 
  AND logdate <= GETDATE();

queries.name: Inloggningar per användare
queries.description: Antal inloggningar per användare senaste månaden
queries.mysql:
SELECT ID1 AS Id, Data1 AS Användare, COUNT(*) AS Antal
FROM smartasslog
WHERE logtype = 14
  AND logdate >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
  AND logdate <= NOW()
GROUP BY ID1, Data1;
queries.mssql:
SELECT ID1 AS Id, Data1 AS [Användare], COUNT(*) AS Antal
FROM smartasslog
WHERE logtype = 14
  AND logdate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE())
  AND logdate <= GETDATE()
GROUP BY ID1, Data1;

queries.description: Visa Everyone-gruppen om den är gömd
queries.mysql: UPDATE lmsgroup SET GroupType = 0 WHERE GroupID = {{groupId}};
queries.mssql: UPDATE lmsgroup SET GroupType = 0 WHERE GroupID = {{groupId}};

SELECT lmshref.href 
FROM lmscourse 
JOIN lmshref ON lmshref.courseid = lmscourse.courseid

queries.mssql:
SELECT lmshref.href

queries.name: Guider som JSON
queries.description: Exportera guider i JSON-format
queries.mysql:
SELECT 
    CONCAT(
        '{"id": "', IFNULL(guideid, ''), '", ',
        '"guidetype": "', IFNULL(guidetype, ''), '", ',
        '"themeid": "', IFNULL(themeid, ''), '", ',
        '"summary": "', REPLACE(REPLACE(IFNULL(summary, ''), '\r', ''), '\n', ''), '", ',
        '"title": "', REPLACE(REPLACE(IFNULL(title, ''), '\r', ''), '\n', ''), '"}'
    ) AS json_data
FROM guide;
queries.mssql:
SELECT 
    CONCAT(
        '{"id": "', ISNULL(CAST(guideid AS VARCHAR), ''), '", ',
        '"guidetype": "', ISNULL(CAST(guidetype AS VARCHAR), ''), '", ',
        '"themeid": "', ISNULL(CAST(themeid AS VARCHAR), ''), '", ',
        '"summary": "', REPLACE(REPLACE(ISNULL(summary, ''), CHAR(13), ''), CHAR(10), ''), '", ',
        '"title": "', REPLACE(REPLACE(ISNULL(title, ''), CHAR(13), ''), CHAR(10), ''), '"}'
    ) AS json_data
FROM guide;
